---
title: "Log Gases Seminar - Summer 2026"
bibliography: references.bib
---

::: {.hidden}
$$
\newcommand\mcy{{\mathcal{Y}}}
\newcommand{\R}{\mathbb{R}}
\def\*#1{\mathbf{#1}}
$$
:::

### Talk 0 (Introductory Talk by Johannes Alt)

See the file "Talk0logGases.pdf" in [Link to Scanned Notes](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1ywoU8MwSaGxhdZm9KTSGTVhmukdxgsSr?usp=sharing).


### Talk 1 (Joint Distribution of eigenvalues of Gaussian random matrices)

See the file "Talk1LogGases.pdf" in [Link to Scanned Notes](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1ywoU8MwSaGxhdZm9KTSGTVhmukdxgsSr?usp=sharing).


### Talk 2 ($\beta$-ensembles and tridiagonal random matrices)

See the page [Here](https://williamclarktennis.github.io/YM-explorations/log-gases-my-talk.html)

### Other Handwritten Scanned Notes

[Link to Scanned Notes](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1ywoU8MwSaGxhdZm9KTSGTVhmukdxgsSr?usp=sharing)

The 6th scan contains some computations regarding the 
smooth map $f: x \mapsto \frac{x}{\lVert x \rVert}$ from 
Proposition 4.1.12 in @Anderson2010.
